description: Sequoia records an influencer-style video recounting the chaos she just survived, completely unaware of the deeper sci-fi ramifications. Trevor also appears, and the scene closes out with a comedic and lighthearted vibe, providing a moment of levity after the intensity of preceding events.

transcript.line: You guys, today is gonna be amaze. I'm, uh, visiting my bae at his start-up company. He's, like, seriously a visionary. We're gonna go get boba together. Stay tuned.
Okay, guys, he's working right now, but I don't know. Does this look like work to you?
Ugh. Damn it! Oh. Uh, hey, Sequoia.
Like e-scooters disrupted long walks or rideshare disrupted drunk driving...
Okay, guys. So, Deke's supes busy, so I'm just gonna bring the boba to him. Wow! Super authentic mo-cap actors. I'm totally stealing that look for ‘Chella.

You guys. I'm, like, seriously freaked out right now. It turns out the office is under attack and, like, nobody told me. You know, it's, like, my life is on the line, you know, and I just... it really puts things into perspective. Like... I'm, like, seriously, like, realizing stuff right now.
You guys, we're getting out. Oh, my God. Thank God you saved me.
Thank you for saving my life.
Thank you for introducing me to Frosé.
